description_long: This is a heavily armored, futuristic combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a matte black finish. The vehicle features a large, centrally mounted cannon on a rotating turret, flanked by multiple smaller barrels or sensors, and two long communication antennas extending from the rear. The body is covered in thick, sloped armor plating, with visible reinforced panels and grilles for engine ventilation. The sides display modular compartments and what appear to be ammunition storage or reactive armor blocks. The vehicle moves on continuous tracks, providing stability and traction for urban or rugged environments. The overall design emphasizes stealth, protection, and firepower, with minimal visible markings or decorative elements.
description: A futuristic, matte black combat vehicle with heavy armor, a large central cannon, and continuous tracks. It features antennas, modular side panels, and a low, angular profile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, sloped armor, central cannon barrel, and two antennas rising from the rear section.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long cannon, modular side panels, track system, and rear-mounted antennas.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the engine grilles, exhausts, and the back of the turret with visible armor plating.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, side compartments, and track system.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large central cannon mounted on the turret, with multiple smaller barrels or sensors flanking it; all located on the turret top.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; reinforced panels on the front, sides, and turret; modular and possibly reactive blocks on the sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte black color; no visible camouflage pattern.
